Package com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.dto

Class AnnotationResponse

java.lang.Object
com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.dto.AnnotationResponse
public class AnnotationResponse extends Object
Response object representing an annotation. Returned to clients when annotation data is requested.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    Long
    annotationId
    Unique identifier of the annotation.
    LocalDateTime
    createdAt
    Timestamp indicating when the annotation was created.
    Long
    itemId
    Identifier of the annotated item.
    String
    note
    Text note associated with the annotation.
    LocalDateTime
    updatedAt
    Timestamp indicating the last update to the annotation.
    Long
    userId
    Identifier of the user who created the annotation.
